d: Cassadee selects a direction and invokes a 3-tile-wide wave, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in the path and knocking them back for [[2]] tiles.
Increases damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[330%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Cassadee creates a water column beneath an enemy, knocking them into the air while dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[1.5]]s.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.

Cassadee selects the nearest ally when a battle starts (prioritizing the ally behind herself), granting them the blessing of Tidal Strength. She deals extra [[60%]]<ATK> magic damage to the enemy once when the blessed ally hits them with normal attacks. The blessing vanishes after this effect is triggered [[9]] times. Cassadee will bless this ally again after [[9]]s. This effect can't be dispelled.
Increases the extra damage to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Blesses the nearest ally after the previous one is defeated, with the blessing cooldown reduced to [[5]]s.
Increases the extra damage to [[80%]]<ATK>.
Cassadee increases her Haste by [[12]] during battle. She gains an extra [[2]] Haste when the first ally blessed by Tidal Strength is alive.
Cassadee increases her Haste by [[15]] during battle. She gains an extra [[4]] Haste when the first ally blessed by Tidal Strength is alive.
Cassadee increases her Haste by [[18]] during battle. She gains an extra [[6]] Haste when the first ally blessed by Tidal Strength is alive.
Cassadee grants temporary blessings to all allies in the path of Running Tide, enhancing their next [[6]] normal attacks with the effect of Tidal Strength.
Empowers the allies' next [[8]] normal attacks with the effect of Tidal Strength.
Casts Undercurrent on an enemy who has taken [[6]] hits from Tidal Strength.
Empowers the allies' next [[9]] normal attacks with the effect of Tidal Strength.
Cassadee reduces the Magic DEF of enemies hit by Running Tide by [[20%]] for [[10]]s.

Cassadee enhances the blessing of Tidal Strength, making its effect permanent and granting extra [[30]] Penetration to the blessed ally. The extra magic damage from the blessing can trigger up to [[18]] times per second.
